{"code": "import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("data.csv")

# Filter for students who achieved prizes (Xếp giải not empty)
prize_df = math_df[math_df['Xếp giải'].notna() & (math_df['Xếp giải'] != '')].copy()

# Convert Điểm to numeric
prize_df['Điểm'] = pd.to_numeric(prize_df['Điểm'], errors='coerce')

# Group by school and calculate average score with more precision
school_avg = prize_df.groupby('Trường')['Điểm'].mean().reset_index()
school_avg = school_avg.sort_values('Điểm', ascending=False)

# Show all schools with avg > 6.0 with full precision
good_schools = school_avg[school_avg['Điểm'] > 6.0]
print(good_schools.to_string())

# Let me also verify each school's data
for _, row in good_schools.iterrows():
    school = row['Trường']
    avg = row['Điểm']
    school_data = prize_df[prize_df['Trường'] == school]
    print(f"\n{school}: avg={avg:.4f}, count={len(school_data)}")
    print(school_data[['Họ và tên', 'Điểm', 'Xếp giải']].to_string())
"}

import pandas as pd
